news.title: Edith Rickert: Novelist, Chaucer scholar and WWI code breaker
news.summary_en: New biography of UChicago professor and alumna shines light on her contributions to cryptography and medieval scholarship

news.title: What a thousand years of economic history reveals about modern growth

news.title: Deep in the ice, Antarctic detectors pick up incoming cosmic rays from outer space
news.summary_en: Detection by Askaryan Radio Array holds promise for future research into sources, nature of cosmic rays and neutrinos
